buildCommand: if cd flutter; then git pull && cd .. ; else git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git; fi && export PATH="$PATH:`pwd`/flutter/bin" && flutter config --enable-web && flutter build web --release --dart-define=SUPABASE_URL=${SUPABASE_URL} --dart-define=SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=${SUPABASE_ANON_KEY} --dart-define=PRODUCTION=true
installCommand: if cd flutter; then git pull && cd .. ; else git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git; fi && export PATH="$PATH:`pwd`/flutter/bin" && flutter doctor && flutter pub get
